📝 Final Quote — Client Review & Approval

Go through each item with the client. ✓ Approve items they want included, ✕ Decline items they don't want. Only approved items appear in the final total and contract.

Go to the Estimate tab, fill in the quote details, then return here to review with the client.

⚙️ Editable Rates

All rates here flow directly into estimate calculations. Changes take effect immediately.

Shingle Roof Products — Rate per Square ($/sq)
ProductC-1 RateC-2 Rate

C-1 = With OSB  |  C-2 = Without OSB

Tile Roof Products — Rate per Square ($/sq)
ProductT-1 LtWT-1 StWT-2 StWT-2 LtW

T-1 LtW = Lightweight w/ OSB  |  T-1 StW = Standard Weight w/ OSB  |  T-2 StW = Standard Weight w/o OSB  |  T-2 LtW = Lightweight w/o OSB

Add-On / Component Rates
ItemUnitRate
IB Roof Products
ProductUnitRate
CertainTeed Roof Products — Rate per Square ($/sq)
ProductC-1 CTC-2 CT

C-1 CT = With OSB  |  C-2 CT = Without OSB (same models)

SizeRate

📄 Initial Contract — Full Estimate
This shows ALL items in the estimate. Use this as the initial presentation to the client. After the client reviews items, go to ✅ Client Review to approve/decline items, then generate the 📋 Final Contract.
🔧 Subcontractors

Check all subcontractors that apply. These will appear pre-checked on the printed contract.

Roof Photos Page
Cover Photo Controls
Drag to reposition · Scroll to zoom
iPad: Tap Print → tap preview thumbnail → Share → Save to Files.  Desktop: Print → Save as PDF.
📋 Final Contract — Approved Items Only
This contract reflects only the items the client approved in Client Review. Declined items are shown crossed-out for the record. Go to ✅ Client Review to change approvals.
iPad: Tap Print → tap preview thumbnail → Share → Save to Files.  Desktop: Print → Save as PDF.
🎨 Material & Color Selections

Select the materials the client has chosen. These will appear on the printed Final Contract. Choose "— To be selected —" if the client wants to sign now and choose later. Note: Tile roof gutters are Steel Only. Some gutter colors are Aluminum Only or Steel Only as noted.

📖 Reference Guides — Click to view color & style options:
📋 Shingle Gutter Styles & Colors ↗ 📋 Tile Gutter Styles & Colors ↗ 📋 Flat Roof Gutter Styles & Colors ↗
